value.found_quote: The scheduler checks every second for due tasks and enqueues them at low priority. A scheduled prompt fires between your turns, not while Claude is mid-response. If Claude is busy when a task comes due, the prompt waits until the current turn ends. All times are interpreted in your local timezone.
value.rationale: The page's "How scheduled tasks run" section directly describes the scheduler checking every second, enqueuing at low priority, firing between turns, and interpreting times in the local timezone — matching all elements of the claim.
